mission.title: etcd: etcdserver: Fix: cannot promote member from follower when auth is enabled
mission.description:
Fixes https://github.com/etcd-io/etcd/issues/20757

The root cause was that the follower wasn't propagating the auth token when forwarding the promotion request to the leader. Therefore, the leader was returning `auth: user name is empty`

This patch contains
- Tests that simulate the scenario from the issue
  - Credits to @jason-lynch for writing the tests in https://github.com/jason-lynch/etcd/commit/58e8806987937d0200786e6c3f8ad797d60a14f6
- Two small snippets to fix the issue and pass the tests

steps: Review the issue discussion for context
Apply the fix from the linked pull request
